历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science (physics category) were approximately 6522, 10727, 31549 (including a gap in the first batch B segment), 12112, and 6822 respectively. In 2022, the ranking significantly dropped, in 2023 there was an obvious gap, in 2024 it quickly recovered to 12112, and in 2025 it further recovered to 6822, showing a strong recovery trend in the past two years, with a baseline of about 6822 in 2025. The enrollment plan for science (physics category) in Heilongjiang Province: 91 in 2021, 95 in 2022, 90 in 2023, 86 in 2024, 91 in 2025; the plan for 2026 is 89, a slight reduction of 2 (about -2.2%) compared to 2025, with a limited impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text:
211 Project, Double First-Class university; in the Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranked about 49th in 2026, up from 52nd in 2025 and 59th in 2024, showing a steady rise in rankings reflecting enhanced comprehensive strength, increasing attractiveness to candidates.
4. [Reputation Heat] In recent years, reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no significant negative public opinion incidents; Douyin comprehensive heat ranking is 94th (evaluation "average"), short video platform exposure is at a medium level, with no significant heat fluctuations; historical filing anomalies: a gap occurred in 2023 (31549), but it quickly recovered in 2024-2025, and the lagging impact on application psychology has basically dissipated; Transportation Engineering A+ (top in the country), Civil Engineering A, both are the university's flagship disciplines; Transportation, Civil Engineering, and other corresponding enrollment majors have strong disciplinary support, providing sustained attraction for candidates in related directions.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer science, electronic information/communication, electrical engineering and automation, and other popular engineering majors continue to have high social heat, aligning with the university's engineering strengths; civil engineering and architecture majors still have low social heat (differentiated wait-and-see), which may suppress applications for related civil engineering majors. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Heilongjiang Province general college entrance examination is about 167,000, an increase from the 117,400 physics category candidates in 2025, but the subject ratio needs estimation, with a slightly intensified overall competitive environment. In 2025, the physics category undergraduate batch score was 360, and the special type control line was 472, remaining stable in recent years; Southwest Jiaotong University is located in Chengdu, Sichuan Province, far from Heilongjiang Province, making it a cross-provincial enrollment; the university's enrollment plan in Heilongjiang Province is relatively small (about 89-91 people), a normal cross-provincial enrollment scale, with no obvious regional preference or rejection signals.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 6822, the slight reduction in the 2026 plan (89 vs 91), the continuous rise in the university's Soft Science ranking (49th), high heat for popular engineering majors but low heat for civil engineering and architecture, the predicted 2026 ranking. The reduction in enrollment theoretically should lower the ranking (easier to enter), but the rise in university ranking, overall engineering heat, and increase in total candidates create upward pressure, with the two offsetting each other, resulting in a slight upward shift in ranking. The predicted minimum ranking is about 6782, with a range of 6282-7282.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 6782, range 6282-7282. Candidates with rankings within the lower limit (6282) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (Computer Science, Transportation, Electrical Engineering, etc.); candidates with rankings in the middle of the range (around 6782) are advised to mainly target Tier 2 majors with some sprinting for Tier 1; candidates with rankings near the upper limit (7282) are advised to secure Tier 2 majors and use Tier 3 as a safety net. Note that majors like Civil Engineering, Materials, and Environmental have low social heat, and their admission rankings may be lower than the school line, making them suitable as safety choices.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts (history category) were approximately 1268, 1198, 1433, 1936, and 1772 respectively. Overall, there is a fluctuating and backward trend. In 2021–2022, it stabilized around 1200, shifted to above 1400 after 2023, further moved back to 1936 in 2024, and slightly recovered to 1772 in 2025. Over the past three years, the cumulative backward shift is about 500 places. The university's enrollment plan for liberal arts (history category) in Heilongjiang Province: 15 in 2021, 12 in 2022, 16 in 2023, 16 in 2024, 14 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 13, a reduction of 1 student compared to 2025 (about -7.1%), a moderate reduction that somewhat intensifies competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 49th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with a continuous upward trend in recent years (from 51st in 2021 to 49th in 2026), steadily enhancing comprehensive strength. Recent reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no significant negative public opinion. The comprehensive Douyin popularity ranking is 94th (rated as 'average'), with moderate exposure. In 2023, there was one neutral public opinion record (a candidate shared feelings after being admitted due to a sharp drop in admission scores), which did not significantly impact overall reputation. The university is primarily engineering-oriented, with no A- or above ratings in liberal arts disciplines. Liberal arts majors mainly rely on the university's overall 211 platform and regional advantages, with relatively limited disciplinary support.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Among liberal arts enrollment majors, law has a divided and wait-and-see social popularity (obvious advantages for civil service exams but fierce competition), Chinese language and literature is recommended (popular for civil service and public institution exams), journalism and communication is clearly discouraged (high employment pressure), and foreign language and literature is generally wait-and-see. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Heilongjiang Province general college entrance examination is about 167,000, with history category candidates around 55,000–56,000 in recent years. By proportion, it is estimated that the history category in 2026 will be about 50,000, a slight reduction in candidate scale. Regarding provincial control lines, the 2025 history category undergraduate batch is 405 points, and the special type control line is 480 points, remaining stable in recent years. Southwest Jiaotong University is located in Chengdu, Sichuan Province, and is a cross-provincial enrollment. The liberal arts enrollment plan is only 13–16 students, a small scale, which is normal cross-provincial enrollment with no obvious regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 1772, the 2026 enrollment reduction (13 vs 14), the overall backward trend in historical rankings, and the divergence in liberal arts major popularity (law/Chinese language and literature are hotter, journalism and communication is colder), the 2026 ranking is predicted. The enrollment reduction theoretically should lower the ranking (easier to enter), but the historical backward trend and increased competition for popular liberal arts majors (law, Chinese language and literature) create upward pressure. After offsetting, the ranking is expected to slightly increase. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1666, with a range of 1366–1966.
